name: Password Generator
description: Generate strong, secure random passwords. Customize length, characters, numbers & symbols.
keywords: password generator, strong password, random password generator, secure password, password maker
howToUse: 1. Select length 2. Choose character types (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, symbols) 3. Click Generate 4. Copy password
faq: Q: Is it secure? A: Generated in browser, not stored. Q: How long should password be? A: 12+ characters.
